creator: me@janh.de
text:
- Update to 0.4.7
- Convert to new options framework
- Strip Makefile header
- Drop LIB_DEPENDS ABI versions
- Move LIB_DEPENDS after LICENSE to pet portlint

Fix: This has only been tested using 'portlint -C', 'port test', and
manual installation, deinstallation, and package creation (no
tinderbox etc.).
